/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -current_version 0.12.0 -o libggml-cpu.0.12.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml-cpu.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/ggml-cpu.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/ggml-cpu.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/repack.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/hbm.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/quants.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/traits.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/amx/amx.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/amx/mmq.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/binary-ops.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/unary-ops.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/vec.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/ops.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/arch/arm/quants.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-cpu.dir/ggml-cpu/arch/arm/repack.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build/ggml/src libggml-base.0.12.0.dylib -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libomp.dylib
